User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile with balance in tokens and profile data.

uid.description: The unique user ID matching Firebase Auth.

tokens.description: The current remaining token balance (e.g., starts at 30, spent on generation).

Website.title: Generated Website
Website.description: The custom website markup, styling, and metadata generated by HarNova AI.

prompt.description: The exact user text prompt used to build this site.

theme.description: The selected visual theme preset (e.g., editorial, modern, minimal).

htmlContent.description: Full valid, responsive self-contained HTML including styling, layout, scripts.

slug.description: The unique hosted subdomain or URL slug (e.g., 'kyoto-cafe').

customDomain.description: User pointer to a registered third-party domain (e.g. 'mycafe.com').

ownerId.description: UID of the owner who created and manages this webpage.

Transaction.title: Token Transaction
Transaction.description: Credit transactions logging user token history.

userId.description: Owner UID associated with the ledger entry.

amount.description: Number of tokens involved in transaction.

description.description: Brief literal description e.g. 'Standard Token Pack' or 'AI Generation'.

Domain.title: Custom Domain
Domain.description: User registered custom domain and mapped DNS records.

ownerId.description: UID of the owner who owns and manages this domain.

linkedSiteId.description: Mapped website landing page ID if any.

domains/{domainId}.description: User registered custom domains and DNS mappings.
